release_notes: Small follow-ups to 1.0.9. The PDF report's page-4 footer line no longer collides with the methodology paragraph. The 'Download update' button now opens audio-dubcheck.com/download in your default browser instead of a stale GitHub URL. And back-to-back PDF exports auto-number Finder-style — first save is bare, subsequent saves get 2, 3, … appended so you don't overwrite by accident. No measurement, dylib, or font changes; the 1.0.9 stability work stands.
